source.name: Playwright Best Practices
source.license_notes: Summarized guidance with source link; do not copy full docs.

goal: Use resilient locators and avoid brittle selectors in browser automation.
when_to_use: Agent needs to click/fill stable elements
steps: Prefer role, text, label, placeholder, and test id locators over CSS/XPath.
Use Playwright Inspector/codegen only as a starting point; review locator semantics.
Scope locators to a region when text repeats.
Avoid selecting by dynamic class names or layout-dependent nth-child selectors.
verification: Element action succeeds without arbitrary sleep
Locator remains unique or intentionally scoped
safety_notes: Do not automate destructive actions without explicit user instruction.

quality.notes: Official Playwright recommends user-facing locators and resilient tests.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Playwright resilient locators: role, label, text, placeholder, test id, and scoped locators. Avoid brittle CSS/XPath and arbitrary sleeps.
